title: BES Cyber System Information Access via Share and Web Downloads

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=wineventlog sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=5145 earliest=-24h
| lookup bcsi_path_tags.csv ShareName, RelativeTargetName OUTPUT classification
| where classification="BCSI"
| stats sum(TransferredBytes) as bytes by Account_Name, ShareName, ComputerName
| where bytes > 104857600
| sort - bytes
value: We monitor access to file shares and web paths classified as BES Cyber System Information for inappropriate bulk retrieval.
implementation: (1) Tag BCSI paths in lookup from information protection register. (2) Enable detailed file share auditing. (3) Alert on high-byte transfers. (4) Integrate with insider threat program.
visualization: Table (large transfers), Bar chart (by user), Single value (events)
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
